OmniScript.name: CEIntake

omniProcessElements.name: Step1_ProjectIdentity
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label": "Project Identity", "showLabel": true, "allowBack": false, "allowSave": false, "showCount": false, "stepNumber": "1" }

omniProcessElements.name: AgencyAbbr
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label": "Lead Agency", "helpText": "Select the federal agency with primary NEPA responsibility for this action.", "required": true, "type": "select", "options": [ {"label": "Bureau of Land Management (BLM)", "value": "DOI - BLM"}, {"label": "Department of Energy (DOE)", "value": "DOE"}, {"label": "Federal Highway Administration (FHWA)", "value": "DOT - FHWA"}, {"label": "Federal Energy Regulatory Commission (FERC)", "value": "FERC"}, {"label": "US Army Corps of Engineers (USACE)", "value": "DOD - USACE"}, {"label": "US Fish and Wildlife Service (USFWS)", "value": "DOI - USFWS"}, {"label": "Other / Multiple Agencies", "value": "OTHER"} ] }

omniProcessElements.name: Name
nepa_description__c
nepa_purpose_need__c
Step2_ActionType
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label": "Action Details", "showLabel": true, "allowBack": true, "allowSave": false, "stepNumber": "2" }

omniProcessElements.name: nepa_action_type__c
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label": "Action Type", "helpText": "What type of action is being proposed?", "required": true, "type": "select", "options": [ {"label": "Abandon or Decommission", "value": "Abandon or Decommission"}, {"label": "Construct New", "value": "Construct New"}, {"label": "Modify Existing", "value": "Modify Existing"}, {"label": "Operate or Maintain Existing", "value": "Operate or Maintain Existing"}, {"label": "Renew or Extend Existing", "value": "Renew or Extend Existing"}, {"label": "Research or Study", "value": "Research or Study"}, {"label": "Other", "value": "Other"} ] }

omniProcessElements.name: nepa_project_sector__c
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label": "Project Sector", "helpText": "The primary resource sector for this project. Used to match agency-specific CE thresholds.", "required": true, "type": "select", "options": [ {"label": "Agriculture and Natural Resources", "value": "Agriculture and Natural"}, {"label": "Energy", "value": "Energy"}, {"label": "Infrastructure and Transportation", "value": "Infrastructure"}, {"label": "Mining and Minerals", "value": "Mining"}, {"label": "Recreation", "value": "Recreation"}, {"label": "Water Resources", "value": "Water"}, {"label": "Other", "value": "Other"} ] }

omniProcessElements.name: Step3_AcreageAndEC
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label": "Site and Environmental Factors", "showLabel": true, "allowBack": true, "allowSave": false, "stepNumber": "3" }

omniProcessElements.name: nepa_disturbance_acres__c
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label": "Surface Disturbance (acres)", "helpText": "Total area of ground disturbance. Enter 0 if no ground disturbance (e.g., indoor or operational actions). Key thresholds: >5 acres typically triggers EA review; >640 acres typically triggers EIS.", "required": true, "min": 0, "precision": 2 }

omniProcessElements.name: ExtraordinaryCircumstances
nepa_applicant_naics__c
Step4_Prescreening
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label": "CE Pre-Screening", "showLabel": true, "allowBack": true, "allowSave": false, "stepNumber": "4" }

omniProcessElements.name: RunCEScreeningIP
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: {"integrationProcedureKey":"NEPA_CEScreeningIP","inputMap":[{"name":"AgencyAbbr","value":"%AgencyAbbr%","valueType":"reference"},{"name":"DisturbanceAcres","value":"%nepa_disturbance_acres__c%","valueType":"reference"},{"name":"ExtraordinaryCircumstances","value":"%ExtraordinaryCircumstances%","valueType":"reference"}],"outputPath":"ScreeningResult","failOnStepError":false,"useFormulas":true,"preAction":true}

omniProcessElements.name: RecommendationDisplay
ClassificationBasisDisplay
MatchingCEsDisplay
Step5_Citation
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label": "Regulatory Citation", "showLabel": true, "allowBack": true, "allowSave": false, "stepNumber": "5" }

omniProcessElements.name: nepa_regulatory_citation__c
nepa_agency_id__c
Step6_ReviewAndSubmit
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label": "Review and Submit", "showLabel": true, "allowBack": true, "allowSave": false, "stepNumber": "6" }

omniProcessElements.name: ReviewSummary
SaveCEIntake
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: {"integrationProcedureKey":"NEPA_CESaveIP","inputMap":[{"name":"AgencyAbbr","value":"%AgencyAbbr%","valueType":"reference"},{"name":"Name","value":"%Name%","valueType":"reference"},{"name":"nepa_description__c","value":"%nepa_description__c%","valueType":"reference"},{"name":"nepa_purpose_need__c","value":"%nepa_purpose_need__c%","valueType":"reference"},{"name":"nepa_action_type__c","value":"%nepa_action_type__c%","valueType":"reference"},{"name":"nepa_disturbance_acres__c","value":"%nepa_disturbance_acres__c%","valueType":"reference"},{"name":"nepa_extraordinary_circumstances__c","value":"%ExtraordinaryCircumstances%","valueType":"reference"},{"name":"nepa_regulatory_citation__c","value":"%nepa_regulatory_citation__c%","valueType":"reference"},{"name":"nepa_agency_id__c","value":"%nepa_agency_id__c%","valueType":"reference"},{"name":"nepa_start_date__c","value":"TODAY()","valueType":"formula"}],"outputPath":"SaveResult","failOnStepError":true,"useFormulas":true,"postAction":true}

omniProcessElements.name: Step7_Confirmation
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label": "Submission Confirmed", "showLabel": true, "allowBack": false, "allowSave": false, "stepNumber": "7", "hideStepMenu": true }

omniProcessElements.name: ConfirmationMessage

OmniScript.propertySetConfig: { "saveType": "Integration Procedure", "seedDataJSON": "", "wrapperClassName": "", "pubSub": false, "showKnowledgeArticles": false, "trackingCustomData": {}, "currencyCode": "", "displayActionsType": "bottom", "labelBackButton": "Back", "labelCancelButton": "Cancel", "labelFinishButton": "Submit CE Screening Request", "labelNextButton": "Next", "labelSaveButton": "Save Draft", "labelSubmitButton": "Submit", "showProgressBar": true, "progressIndicator": "bottom", "allowSaveForLater": false, "warnings": [], "ssm": false, "bpType": "", "bpSubType": "", "bpLanguage": "", "bpVersion": "", "bpVersionPublishState": "" }
